scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.e2e.json playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md scripts tests/e2e docs/methodology/README.md docs/methodology/formulas.md docs/methodology/limitations.md apps/web/vite.config.ts apps/web/wrangler.jsonc apps/web/src/styles.css apps/web/src/app/routes/MethodologyPage.tsx apps/web/src/app/routes/RunDetailPage.tsx apps/web/src/app/source-revision.ts apps/web/src/app/source-revision.test.ts apps/web/src/components/MetricSelector.tsx apps/web/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx apps/web/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx packages/contracts/package.json packages/contracts/tsconfig.json packages/contracts/src/index.ts packages/contracts/src/run.ts packages/contracts/src/run.test.ts packages/runner/package.json packages/runner/tsconfig.json packages/runner/src/cli.ts packages/runner/src/cli.test.ts packages/runner/src/publisher.ts
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @codexspeed/web types:check && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.check: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test:cli-built && corepack pnpm test:e2e:prepared && corepack pnpm test:sensitive && git diff --check
